root.m_Talk_ENG: It's because of that program that the development went much easier, Naielle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Academy students' level isn't as bad as I thought.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The Academy students' level isn't as bad as I thought.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Who's this little kid...? Did an elementary student follow me in here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, don't you know that children aren't allowed in here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: E-elementary student?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: E-elementary student?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: E-elementary student?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am Seo Garam! A teacher at the Academy! I'm ten years older than you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am Seo Garam! A teacher at the Academy! I'm ten years older than you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am Seo Garam! A teacher at the Academy! I'm ten years older than you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You're wearing a randoseru backpack, you pipsqueak!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You're wearing a randoseru backpack, you pipsqueak!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You're wearing a randoseru backpack, you pipsqueak!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this isn't any ordinary randoseru!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this isn't any ordinary randoseru!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this isn't any ordinary randoseru!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is Office Lady Y's symbol from Street Counter 8.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is Office Lady Y's symbol from Street Counter 8.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is Office Lady Y's symbol from Street Counter 8.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's a tragic character who grew up in an impoverished family and only had a chance to experience childhood innocence as an adult!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's a tragic character who grew up in an impoverished family and only had a chance to experience childhood innocence as an adult!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's a tragic character who grew up in an impoverished family and only had a chance to experience childhood innocence as an adult!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you know the importance of the details?!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you know the importance of the details?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft! The details? What about it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft! The details? What about it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft! The details? What about it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're just a kid who's spouting about things only you know.

root.m_Talk_FRA: You're just a kid who's spouting about things only you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, fine. I get that you're at an age when you're curious about simulations.94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because... I'm purposefully avoiding them.
